description_long: This is an egg-shaped object with a highly reflective, glossy surface that mirrors its surroundings. The exterior features a detailed photographic print of the Church of the Savior on Spilled Blood in Saint Petersburg, Russia, with its colorful onion domes and ornate architectural details clearly visible on one side. The rest of the surface reflects a cloudy sky and lush green trees, giving the egg a striking, almost metallic appearance. The object is smooth and seamless, with no visible seams or openings. The overall coloration is dominated by grays, golds, greens, and blues, with the architectural print providing a vibrant focal point. The egg appears solid and decorative, likely intended as a display piece rather than for consumption.
description: A glossy, reflective egg featuring a photographic print of the Church of the Savior on Spilled Blood, with mirrored reflections of trees and sky on its smooth surface.
description_view_0: The egg displays the most detailed view of the church's onion domes and ornate architecture, with vibrant colors and intricate patterns.
description_view_1: This view shows the edge of the church print, with more of the reflective surface displaying green trees and a cloudy sky.
description_view_2: The egg is mostly covered by the reflection of dense green foliage and sky, with no architectural details visible.
description_view_3: A partial view of the church's domes is visible, along with reflections of trees and sky, blending the decorative print with the mirrored surface.
attribute_orientation: upright with the pointed end facing up
attribute_contextual_placement: Most likely used as a decorative object in a home, gallery, or souvenir shop, especially in a setting celebrating Russian culture or architecture.
attribute_decorative_patterns: photographic print of the Church of the Savior on Spilled Blood with reflective mirrored areas
